title: Atp13a2 Flox and Atp13a2 Null Genotyping
author: Hanne HD Dhondt
materials: Midori Green nucleic acid staining solution

Visualize the gel in the machine Gene Flash (Syngene Bio Imaging; Westburg, VWR) OR via Bio-Rad Chemidoc MP Imaging System. A B C 1 Results Band Notation 2 Floxed 564bp Flox 3 Wild type 426bp WT 4 Knock-out 256bp KO

steps.title: Carry out the PCR process under the UV light cabinet
steps.instruction: Carry out the PCR process under the UV light cabinet. Prepare a Working Dilution ( 25 micromolar (µM) ) of the PCR primers. A B C D 1 PCR primers Sequence 5' - 3' Stock Working 2 Forward primer CTG CAG CTT CGA GAG GAA AG 100 µM 25 µM 3 Reverse primer (WT/Flox) CAC TCT GTC CTC AGG CCT TC 100 µM 25 µM 4 Reverse primer 1 (KO) TGA GAA GTG GGA ATC GGG 100 µM 25 µM

steps.title: Prepare a mix for all samples...
steps.instruction: Prepare a mix for all samples containing the following components: Prepare positive and negative controls per gene and prepare extra volume to account for pipetting variation. A B C 1 Component Amount Final conce 2 F primer (25 µM) 0.75 µl 750 nM 3 R primer (25 µM) 0.75 µl 750 nM 4 R primer 1 (25 µM) 0.75 µl 750 nM 5 PCR mix (2x) 12.5 µl 1x 6 H2O 8.75 µl -- 7 DNA 1.5 µl 8 Total volume 25 µl

steps.title: To each PCR tube, add 1
steps.instruction: To each PCR tube, add 1.5 µL gDNA from each sample and 23.5 µL from the reaction mixture.

steps.title: Run PCR protocol A B C...
steps.instruction: Run PCR protocol A B C D 1 Initial denaturation 94 °C 3' 2 Denaturation 94 °C 30'' X30 3 Annealing 58 °C 30" 4 Elongation 72 °C 30" 5 Final extension 72°C 10' 6 Hold 4 °C 

steps.title: Prepare a 1
steps.instruction: Prepare a 1.5% agarose gel in TBE buffer containing Midori Green (1:10000). Double gel: A B 1 TBE 250 ml 2 Agarose powder 3.75 g 3 Midori Green 25 µl Single gel: A B 1 TBE 150 ml 2 Agarose powder 2.25 g 3 Midori Green 15 µl

steps.title: Dilute TBE from the stock (10x)...
steps.instruction: Dilute TBE from the stock (10x) to a 1x in distilled water.

steps.title: Weight and add the agarose powder...
steps.instruction: Weight and add the agarose powder in a dedicated glass bottle together with TBE.

steps.title: Heat the solution in the microwave
steps.instruction: Heat the solution in the microwave.

steps.title: Cool it down by swirling underneath cold water
steps.instruction: Cool it down by swirling underneath cold water.

steps.title: Add the Midori Green nucleic acid...
steps.instruction: Add the Midori Green nucleic acid staining solution and mix it again.

steps.title: Pour it in the gel system...
steps.instruction: Pour it in the gel system and remove the bubbles (using a tip). Insert the combs and wait for its gelification (+/- 20 min).

steps.title: Place the gel in the system...
steps.instruction: Place the gel in the system and cover with TBE buffer.

steps.title: Vortex ladder prior to loading to ensure even glycerol distribution
steps.instruction: Vortex ladder prior to loading to ensure even glycerol distribution. Load the samples ( 25 µL ) + DNA ladder ( 15 µL ) into one well of the gel . Do not leave more than 4 wells without any sample to avoid the smiling effect.

steps.title: Run the samples for 01:20:00 at 120 V
steps.instruction: Run the samples for 01:20:00 at 120 V. Black is negative, red is positive. (The DNA is negatively charged and will run towards the positive electrode.) Always run to red!
